munit:test.name: sf-check-ping-status-successful-ping
munit:test.description: Verify that sf-check-ping-status calls the downstream PAPI and returns an OK ping response with status, apiName, apiVersion, timestamp and dependencies
munit:test.doc:name: sf-check-ping-status Successful Ping Test
munit:test.doc:description: Mocks cf-request-account-process-api and asserts the p-ping-response DWL constructs the expected response structure

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Empty Initial Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Initialises the test with an empty payload to simulate an inbound ping request

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock cf-request-account-process-api Flow
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Intercepts the HTTP call to the downstream PAPI and returns a canned OK ping response

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Return Mocked Ping PAPI Response
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Supplies an OK status payload simulating a successful ping from the process API

flow-ref.name: sf-check-ping-status
flow-ref.doc:name: Invoke sf-check-ping-status Sub-Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Calls the sf-check-ping-status sub-flow under test

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts the ping response payload is not null after the DWL transformation

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Status Is OK
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts that the p-ping-response DWL hardcoded status field is OK

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Timestamp Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Verifies the DWL-generated timestamp field is present in the response

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Dependencies Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Confirms the dependencies field (mapped from the upstream payload) is present
